page_metadata.biotools__summary: FSTVAL is an open access web tool to manage bulk flanking sequence tags (FSTs).FSTVAL automatically evaluates the FSTs and finds the best mapping positions of the FST against a known genome sequence.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: FSTVAL is an open access web tool to manage bulk flanking sequence tags (FSTs).FSTVAL automatically evaluates the FSTs and finds the best mapping positions of the FST against a known genome sequence.
